name: ClashCheckHandler
summary: The ClashCheckHandler class contains clash check methods.

methods.name: GetIntersectionBoundingBoxes
methods.signature: public ArrayList GetIntersectionBoundingBoxes(Identifier ID1, Identifier ID2)
methods.summary: Get a list of bounding boxes (AABB) of the clashing volumes of two objects.

params.name: ID1
params.doc: The identifier of the first object.

params.name: ID2
params.doc: The identifier of the second object.

returns.doc: A list of bounding boxes of the clashing volumes.

methods.name: RunClashCheck
methods.summary: Starts the clash checking. Uses advanced options sa option values.

methods.name: RunClashCheckWithOptions(Boolean, Boolean, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool RunClashCheckWithOptions(bool betweenReferenceModels, bool objectsInsideReferenceModels, double minDistance, bool betweenParts)
methods.summary: Starts the clash checking with options.

params.name: betweenReferenceModels
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed between reference models.

params.name: objectsInsideReferenceModels
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed to objects inside reference models.

params.name: betweenParts
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed between native parts.

methods.name: RunClashCheckWithOptions(Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool RunClashCheckWithOptions(bool betweenReferenceModels, bool betweenReferenceModelsAndComponents, bool objectsInsideReferenceModels, double minDistance, bool betweenParts)
methods.summary: Starts the clash checking with options.

params.name: betweenReferenceModels
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed between reference models.

params.name: betweenReferenceModelsAndComponents
params.doc: True, if clash cehck should be performed between reference models and components.

params.name: objectsInsideReferenceModels
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed to objects inside reference models.

params.name: betweenParts
params.doc: True, if clash check should be performed between native parts.

methods.name: StopClashCheck
methods.remarks: Stops the clash check only when the Advanced Options' XS_USE_NEW_CLASH_CHECK is set.
